TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Philippe_of_Belgium, title = Philippe_of_Belgium, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Philippe_of_Belgium} }

S.FORM: == Philippe of Belgium == ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 4, Philippe of Belgium, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1960) mrhuw Belguim ta' misuw hya' ga Philippe of Belgium, aring ryax tay 21 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2313 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Philippe of Belgium == ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 4, Philippe of Belgium, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1960) mrhuw Belguim ta' misuw hya' ga Philippe of Belgium, aring ryax tay 21 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2313 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == pħilippe o* βelɣium == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, pħilippe o* βelɣium, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βelɣuim taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa pħilippe o* βelɣium, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
